title: Laser's Additions [Cobblemon]
description: Adds custom moves from Laser's Fakemon Pack to vanilla Pokemon species (Also makes a TON of buffs, nerfs, and tweaks)
body:
![Laser's Additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32d769b26fe34e878a222b03a144cd0969d7e6ab_0.webp)
![bulletin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc97e74f8747c038a166adddab984e15cb8511a.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hFP8I95FVbc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![bulletin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc97e74f8747c038a166adddab984e15cb8511a.png)
# **Overview:**
Laser's Additions started out as just **giving some of the moves added in [Laser's Fakemon Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lasers-fakemon-pack) to vanilla Pokemon,** but I ended up adding a TON of new stuff as well! Full reworks and revamps of classic moves and abilities, buffed movesets, and even a Sandstorm Castform! Also adds new move categories for Kicking, Throwing, Hammer, Beam, and Light moves.

The number of changes are unfortunately too many to list (I tried but it reached the character limit). You can see all the changes in the changelog within the files of the Datapack version, as well as see most of the general changes on my [**Discord server!**](https://discord.gg/fkE5s2BARg)

### **DISCLAIMER:** This pack alters a lot of Pokemon's movesets, they they can and WILL conflict with other addons that do similar things!

**The datapack version contains a folder with configs for the [SimpleTMs](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon) mod that allows the new moves to be obtained as TMs.**
